# image / table

The **image** type's `data-view.cell` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Cell({ match: "image", ... })` — a read-only
`ImageCell` that renders a small thumbnail of the projected image URL.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Image field type: data-view table cell (read-only thumbnail).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Cell` "image" → `ImageCell`
